more.title: Two man in court for murdering NPA driver, dumping body near Lake Chivero
more.description: Two men have appeared in court accused of murdering a National Prosecuting Authority (NPA) driver before dumping his body near Lake Chivero. The two are Tawanda Ruzvidzo (38) and Edmond Muzuva (32). They are facing murder and armed robbery charges. Ruzvidzo and Muzuva were remanded in custody following their hospital remand presided over by Harare [...] The post Two man in court for murdering NPA driver, dumping body near Lake Chivero appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com .

more.title: Bribery racket targets Zimbabwe’s nursing school hopefuls
more.description: Liliosa Jakata sold four cattle that were the only assets she owned after people claiming to be political intermediaries told her that they could – for a fee – secure nursing training places for her daughters.

more.title: Fuel hikes threaten health delivery and household stability
more.description: Rising fuel prices have emerged as a critical pressure point in Zimbabwe, with health experts and social commentators warning that the ripple effects are straining the public health system while placing increasing pressure on already fragile social systems and family livelihoods.

more.title: ZWG annual inflation rises to 4,4% as Middle East tension drive costs
more.description: Zimbabwe’s annual inflation rate rose slightly to 4.4% in March 2026, driven largely by global fuel price increases linked to escalating tensions in the Middle East. The spike in fuel costs follows the ongoing US-Iran conflict, which has disrupted supply chains in key Middle Eastern markets, a strategic source of fuel for Zimbabwe.
